headline: Aeropay To Leverage Jack Henry (JKHY)’s Embedded Payments Technology To Expand Its Instant Payment Capabilities
summary: Jack Henry & Associates, Inc. (NASDAQ:JKHY), with a forward P/E of 18.02x and upside potential of 50.70%, is among the top 10 lowest forward P/E stocks in the S&P 500.
